2605.18128.title: POST: Prior-Observation Adversarial Learning of Spatio-Temporal Associations for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
2605.18128.paper_summary: Existing Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection (MTSAD) frameworks increasingly rely on integrating Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with sequence models to capture complex spatio-temporal dependencies. However, less attention is paid to the spatial over-generalization problem, where unconstrained structural modeling indiscriminately reconstructs anomalies, inevitably degrading detection recall. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel framework that unifies spatio-temporal modeling through a joint prior-observation adversarial learning paradigm. In the spatial dimension, the model alternately learns adjacency matrices as structural prior and models the association discrepancy between prior and data-driven observation in a minimax manner during training. Such adversarial optimization not only improves the model sensitivity for time-wise detection, but also enables the model to localize anomalies to specific channels. To systematically evaluate this anomaly localization capability, we further construct a synthetic benchmark equipped with precise channel-wise annotations. Extensive experiments across public datasets and our dedicated benchmark demonstrate that the proposed framework establishes a new state-of-the-art in both time-wise detection and spatial localization tasks. Our code, pre-trained models, and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/anocodetest1/POST.
2605.18128.paper_summary_zh: 現有的多變量時間序列異常檢測（MTSAD）框架越來越依賴於將圖神經網絡（GNN）與序列模型整合，以捕捉複雜的時空依賴關係。<lb/>然而，對於空間過度泛化問題的關注較少，這種問題中不受限制的結構建模無差別地重建異常，必然會降低檢測的召回率。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個新框架，通過聯合先驗-觀察對抗學習範式統一時空建模。<lb/>在空間維度上，模型交替學習鄰接矩陣作為結構先驗，並在訓練過程中以最小最大方式建模先驗與數據驅動觀察之間的關聯差異。<lb/>這種對抗優化不僅提高了模型對時間檢測的敏感性，還使模型能夠將異常定位到特定通道。<lb/>為了系統地評估這種異常定位能力，我們進一步構建了一個配備精確通道標註的合成基準。<lb/>在公共數據集和我們專門的基準上進行的大量實驗表明，所提出的框架在時間檢測和空間定位任務中樹立了新的最先進水平。<lb/>我們的代碼、預訓練模型和基準可以在 https://github.com/anocodetest1/POST 上公開獲得。
2605.18128.author: Suofei Zhang et.al.
2605.18128.authors: Suofei Zhang, Yaxuan Zheng, Haifeng Hu
